faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about sleep apnea, treatment, and how the platform works.
faq.patientsSubtitle: Everything you need to know about your pathway and treatment
faq.doctorsSubtitle: Information about collaborating with the platform
faq.ctaSubtitle: Our team is available to answer all your questions.
faq.q1: How much does CPAP treatment cost?
faq.a1: In France, CPAP treatment is covered by Social Security (60%) and your health insurance (usually 40%). In most cases, you pay nothing. The system works through monthly device rental, including monitoring and accessories.
faq.a2: A sleep test prescribed by a doctor is a medical examination covered by Social Security and your insurance. Unlike some countries where you need to buy a "diagnostic pack", in France the medical pathway guarantees coverage.
faq.a3: Yes, absolutely! In France, the law guarantees your free choice of home healthcare provider. Even if your doctor recommends a provider, you have the right to choose the platform. We provide an explanatory document for your doctor.
faq.a4: No, CPAP treatment is not painful. There may be an adjustment period in the first few days (air sensation, wearing the mask), but our team helps you find the most comfortable mask and adjust the settings. Most patients adapt quickly.
faq.a5: Once your prescription is received and you contact us, we arrange home installation usually within 5 to 7 days. In urgent cases, we can speed up the process.
faq.q6: What to do in case of a breakdown?
faq.a6: We have an emergency service reachable by phone. In case of a breakdown, we send a replacement device as quickly as possible (usually within 24-48h).
faq.q7: Do I need to use the machine every night?
faq.a7: Yes, for the treatment to be effective and to maintain reimbursement, you must use the machine every night. Social Security requires minimum usage (usually more than 3h per night for at least 20 days per month).
faq.a8: The mask should be cleaned daily with warm water and mild soap, then air-dried. We provide a complete maintenance guide during installation.
faq.qDoc1: How does the platform transmit compliance data?
faq.aDoc1: We transmit compliance reports automatically via your secure doctor portal. You also receive periodic reports by email according to your preference. Data includes daily usage, leaks, pressure, and residual AHI.
faq.aDoc2: Data is hosted on HDS-certified servers (Health Data Hosting) and GDPR compliant. Only you, your patient, and the assigned monitoring team have access to the data. We strictly respect medical confidentiality.
faq.qDoc3: How can my patients choose the platform?
faq.aDoc3: The patient simply needs to indicate their wish to be monitored by the platform. You write the provider name on the CPAP prescription. We provide an explanatory document that the patient can give you.
faq.qDoc4: What does the platform do in case of poor compliance?
faq.aDoc4: We systematically contact the patient as soon as a decrease in compliance is detected. We identify problems (discomfort, leaks, difficulties), propose solutions (mask change, adjustment...) and inform you. Our goal is to intervene before the problem worsens.
faq.qDoc5: How to request access to the doctor portal?
faq.aDoc5: Contact us via the contact form or by phone with your professional details and RPPS number. We verify your status and create your access within 24h.

whyUs.heroSubtitle: We are breaking the codes of traditional medical equipment to put the patient back at the heart of the care pathway.
whyUs.problemTitle: The problem with the current model
whyUs.problemIntro: In France, the sleep apnea equipment market suffers from an opaque system:
whyUs.problem1: Doctors systematically refer to "their" usual providers
whyUs.problem2: Patients don't know they have free choice of provider
whyUs.problem3: Follow-up is minimal: "set up the device and leave"
whyUs.problem4: Difficult to reach someone in case of a problem
whyUs.valuesSubtitle: What guides each of our decisions and actions every day
whyUs.value1Desc: You are at the center of everything we do. We respect your intelligence, your time, and your choices.
whyUs.value2Desc: We clearly explain your pathway, your rights, reimbursement, and how the treatment works.
whyUs.value3Desc: Modern patient portal, intelligent remote monitoring, seamless communication. Technology at the service of your health.
whyUs.value4Desc: Behind the technology, a dedicated team, available and attentive to support you every day.
whyUs.diffSubtitle: Concretely, on a daily basis, here is what makes the difference
whyUs.diff1Desc: Responsive support by phone, email, or messaging. No endless waiting.
whyUs.diff2Desc: We monitor your compliance and contact you when there's a difficulty, before it becomes a problem.
whyUs.diff3Desc: We take the time to explain, train, and answer all your questions.
whyUs.diff4Desc: Latest generation devices, quality accessories, rigorous maintenance.
whyUs.freeChoiceText: In France, the law guarantees your free choice of home healthcare provider. Even if your doctor recommends a provider, you can choose the platform.
whyUs.freeChoiceStep1: Inform your doctor that you wish to be monitored by the platform
whyUs.freeChoiceStep2: We provide an explanatory document for your doctor
whyUs.ctaSubtitle: Join patients who have chosen a modern and human approach to their treatment.
